Introduces the challenges of MAPF, discusses classical and MARL-based approaches, and highlights the limitations of existing methods. Describes the contributions of the proposed...
Reviews traditional search-based MAPF solvers and MARL-based approaches, noting the diversity in settings, strategies, and communication mechanisms used in recent works.
Summarizes the EPH approach and its performance, highlighting future work directions such as training with other RL algorithms and better hybridization techniques.
